title: onobrychis humilis subsp. humilis
intro: Onobrychis humilis subsp. humilis, also known as the dwarf bird's-foot trefoil, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family and is native to parts of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Onobrychis humilis subsp. humilis include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of conditions such as fever, cough, and diarrhea, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in the form of dried roots and leaves in traditional medicine.
